title: Reveal map and switch region lens to Europe
description: Verifies a visitor can reveal the interactive map on the dashboard and switch the region lens to Europe with the map updating accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the interactive map section is revealed
Switch the map region lens to Europe
Verify the map updates to show the Europe view

title: Open global search from the home page and navigate to a result
description: Verifies a visitor can open the global search modal from the home page, search for a topic, and navigate to one of the returned results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press Ctrl+K
Fill housing into the search input
Click the first available search result
Verify the user lands on a result detail page

title: Open province/state side panel from map selection
description: Verifies selecting a colored province or state SVG path element on the choropleth map opens a side panel showing that specific province name (e.g. Ontario or Quebec), not just Canada. Click directly on a colored SVG path element inside the map container, not on breadcrumb navigation buttons.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the interactive map section is revealed
Click a colored province or state on the map
Verify a side panel opens showing the selected region name and navigation tabs

title: Pan and zoom stability on the dashboard map
description: Verifies a visitor can pan and zoom the dashboard map and the map remains interactive and stable after the interactions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the interactive map section is revealed
Pan the map to a different position
Zoom the map in
Zoom the map out
Verify the map remains visible and interactive after pan and zoom

title: Open global search from another page and keep context
description: Verifies a visitor can open the global search modal from a non-home page and still navigate to a result successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /bills
Press Ctrl+K
Fill housing into the search input
Click the first available search result
Verify the user lands on a result detail page

title: Browse Bills tab in the map side panel
description: Verifies a visitor can open the Bills tab in the region side panel and see legislation items for the selected region.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the interactive map section is revealed
Click a colored province or state on the map
Open the Bills tab within the side panel
Verify a list of legislation items for the selected region is displayed

title: Open a bill from the table to view its detail page
description: This test verifies selecting a legislation row opens a bill detail view that displays full bill information.

steps.description: Navigate to /bills
Open the first bill or legislation row in the table
Verify the bill detail page shows bill title and jurisdiction
Verify a stage timeline, a stance badge, and a summary section are displayed

title: Close side panel and return to full map view
description: Verifies a visitor can close the region side panel and return to the full map view without losing access to the map.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the interactive map section is revealed
Click a colored province or state on the map
Close the side panel
Verify the full map view is visible and interactive

title: Bills table renders core columns and row metadata
description: This test verifies the bills listing renders a table of legislation with the expected bill metadata visible for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /bills
Verify a table of legislation rows is displayed
Verify each row shows bill code, title, jurisdiction, stage, and a stance indicator

title: Browse projects list and open a project detail
description: Verifies a visitor can browse project cards and open a project to view its full details successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /projects
Wait for the projects list to finish loading
Click a project card to open its detail view
Verify the project detail view displays the project name, location, unit count, status, and a description

title: Browse news list
description: Verifies visitors can open the news index and see a rendered list of news articles suitable for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /news
Verify a list of news articles is displayed

title: Bill detail shows stage timeline, stance, and summary when opened from a listing
description: This test verifies that opening a bill from the /bills listing leads to a detail page at /legislation/[id] (e.g. /legislation/canada-federal) with timeline stages (Filed, Committee, Floor, Enacted), stance indicator, and summary. Bill detail routes are /legislation/[id], NOT /bills/[id].

steps.description: Navigate to /bills
Open the first bill or legislation row in the table
Verify the stage timeline is displayed with the standard stages (Filed, Committee, Floor, Enacted)
Verify a stance badge and a summary paragraph are displayed

title: See politicians directory with country control available
description: Verifies a visitor can open the politicians directory and see official cards along with a country filter control.

steps.description: Navigate to /politicians
Wait for the politicians list to finish loading
Verify official cards are displayed and a country filter control is present

title: Open a news article from the index
description: Verifies visitors can open a news article from the news index and land on a readable detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /news
Click a news article from the list
Verify the news detail view is displayed with article content

title: Use in-page link to reach bills content from the dashboard
description: Verifies a visitor can follow an in-page link from the dashboard to reach the bills content section or listing successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until an in-page link to the bills content is visible
Click the in-page link to view bills
Verify bills content is displayed

title: Bills live search filters results in real time
description: This test verifies that typing into the bills search input immediately filters the visible rows without requiring a page reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /bills
Type housing into the bills search field
Verify the table updates to show only matching results

title: View project detail content for a selected project
description: Verifies a visitor can open a project from the projects list and see all expected fields on the detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /projects
Wait for the projects list to finish loading
Click a project card to open its detail view
Verify the project detail view displays the project name, location, unit count, status, and description

title: Search results update when the query changes
description: Verifies changing the search query updates the visible result set in the global search modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press Ctrl+K
Fill housing into the search input
Fill housing affordability into the search input
Verify a list of search results is displayed for the updated query

title: Switch politicians country from Canada to United States
description: Verifies a visitor can change the country filter to United States and the displayed officials update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /politicians
Wait for the politicians list to finish loading
Select United States in the country filter control
Verify the displayed officials update after changing the country selection

title: Scan projects list for unit counts and statuses
description: Verifies a visitor can view a list of projects where each card includes unit count and status information.

steps.description: Navigate to /projects
Wait for the projects list to finish loading
Verify multiple project cards are displayed with unit counts and statuses visible

title: Drill into a supported province to census-division view with project dots
description: Verifies drilling into a supported province (such as Ontario or Quebec) zooms the map to census-division boundaries and shows project location dots.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the interactive map section is revealed
Select a drill-down supported province on the map
Verify the map shows census-division level boundaries and project dots

title: Apply and clear politicians filters
description: Verifies a visitor can apply region/party/search filters to narrow results and then clear filters to restore the refreshed directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /politicians
Wait for the politicians list to finish loading
Select a valid region filter option
Select a valid party filter option
Fill a short query into the politician search field
Clear all applied filters
Verify the directory results refresh to an unfiltered state

title: Search modal can be dismissed without navigating
description: Verifies a visitor can close the global search modal and return to the underlying page without any navigation occurring.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press Ctrl+K
Press Escape
Verify the search modal is not visible

title: Use breadcrumb navigation to return from province drill-down to Canada view
description: Verifies breadcrumb navigation appears in the drill-down view and can be used to return to the Canada-level map view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the interactive map section is revealed
Select a drill-down supported province on the map
Use the breadcrumb navigation to return to the Canada view
Verify the map returns to the Canada-level view

title: Switch map coloring to Crisis severity
description: This test verifies that changing the map coloring dimension to crisis severity updates the choropleth and shows the correct categorical legend.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the map color-dimension controls are visible
Select the Crisis severity dimension
Verify the map coloring updates to a new pattern
Verify a categorical legend is displayed with the expected crisis severity categories

title: Open per-source health details from the footer indicator
description: Ensures a visitor can open the per-source health details UI from the health footer indicator and see individual source statuses displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the page footer area
Click the health status indicator
Verify per-source health details are displayed

title: Switch map coloring to Affordability
description: This test verifies that changing the map coloring dimension to affordability updates the choropleth and shows a gradient legend scale.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the map color-dimension controls are visible
Select the Affordability dimension
Verify the map coloring updates to a new pattern
Verify a gradient legend is displayed with a low-to-high scale

title: Search can be opened, used, dismissed, and reopened in one session
description: Verifies the global search modal remains usable across repeated open/close cycles on the same page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press Ctrl+K
Press Escape
Press Ctrl+K
Fill housing into the search input
Verify a list of search results is displayed

title: Project types legend appears in drill-down view
description: Verifies the drill-down province view displays project dots colored by type and shows a project types legend describing the colors.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down until the interactive map section is revealed
Select a drill-down supported province on the map
Verify a project types legend is displayed alongside the project dots

title: Open a project detail from the projects list after reviewing key fields
description: Verifies a visitor can review unit counts and statuses on project cards and then open a selected project for full detail.

steps.description: Navigate to /projects
Wait for the projects list to finish loading
Scroll to view additional project cards
Click a project card to open its detail view
Verify the project detail view is displayed and includes a description section

title: Health status footer displays overall health indicator on home
description: Ensures the home page shows a health status footer indicator so visitors can assess data freshness at a glance.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the page footer area
Verify a health status indicator is displayed in the footer

title: Clear bills search restores the full listing
description: This test verifies clearing the search input returns the bills table to its unfiltered state.

steps.description: Navigate to /bills
Type housing into the bills search field
Clear the bills search field
Verify the table returns to the unfiltered listing of rows

title: Ensure project detail page remains usable after a refresh
description: Verifies a visitor can refresh a project detail page and still see the project information render normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /projects
Wait for the projects list to finish loading
Click a project card to open its detail view
Refresh the page
Verify the project detail view still displays the project name, location, unit count, status, and description

title: Home page shows AI overview when available
description: Verifies the home page surfaces the AI-style news overview section when static summaries are present and loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the news overview section
Verify an AI-style overview section is displayed

title: Search supports empty query state without navigation
description: Verifies clearing the query in the global search modal shows an appropriate empty or default state and does not navigate away.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press Ctrl+K
Fill housing into the search input
Press Backspace until the search input is empty
Verify no search result is selected or opened and the user remains on the underlying page

title: Default map coloring and legend render on initial load
description: This test verifies the map coloring control has a default selected dimension and shows a corresponding legend on the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the map color-dimension controls are visible
Verify a default dimension is selected
Verify a legend is displayed for the default dimension

title: Switch between multiple map coloring dimensions without breaking the legend
description: This test verifies the user can switch between two different dimensions in sequence and the legend remains consistent with the latest selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the map color-dimension controls are visible
Select the Crisis severity dimension
Select the Affordability dimension
Verify the legend matches the currently selected dimension type

title: Sort the bills table by an available column
description: This test verifies that using a table sort control changes the ordering of the visible legislation rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /bills
Activate sorting on an available sortable column
Verify the row ordering changes based on the selected sort

title: Map coloring dimension persists while browsing other home sections
description: This test verifies that after changing the map coloring dimension, continuing to browse the home page does not reset the selected dimension unexpectedly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll until the map color-dimension controls are visible
Select the Crisis severity dimension
Scroll further down the home page to a different section
Scroll back to the map color-dimension controls
Verify the previously selected dimension is still active

title: Access project description and data sources from About
description: Ensures a visitor can read the About page and navigate to the Data Sources page where the data provenance content is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Scroll to the main About content section
Click the link to view data sources
Verify data sources content is displayed

title: Submit contact form successfully with valid inputs
description: Verifies visitors can submit the contact form with valid required fields and see a success acknowledgement.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill Test Visitor into the name field
Fill test.visitor@example.com into the email field
Fill A short message for automated UI testing into the message field
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation or acknowledgement is visible

title: Methodology page renders stance definitions
description: Ensures a visitor can open the Methodology page and see stance definitions rendered as part of the methodology content.

steps.description: Navigate to /methodology
Scroll through the methodology content
Verify stance definitions are displayed

title: Render globe visualization
description: Verifies visitors can open the globe page and see the globe visualization rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /globe
Verify a globe visualization is displayed

title: Visitor widget is visible on home layout
description: Verifies the visitor presence widget appears on the home page layout so visitors can see presence information or a fallback indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer area of the page
Verify a visitor presence widget is displayed

title: Contact form blocks submission when required fields are empty
description: Verifies the contact form enforces required fields and shows validation feedback when submitted empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form
Verify required-field validation feedback is displayed

title: Rotate globe by dragging
description: Verifies visitors can drag to rotate the globe and the visualization remains interactive and stable after rotation.

steps.description: Navigate to /globe
Click and drag on the globe visualization to rotate it
Verify the globe view updates to a new orientation and remains rendered

title: Visitor widget renders a stable fallback state when live count is unavailable
description: Verifies the visitor presence widget can render a non-breaking fallback indicator/state without disrupting the page layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer area of the page
Verify the visitor presence widget shows a non-breaking indicator state rather than a broken component
